## Checklist
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (all tests green)
- [ ] `mypy forge` passes (strict, no new errors)
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check` pass
- [ ] New code has tests if it adds behaviour
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if this is a user-facing change
